name: Declaratory Judgment for Section 6166 Eligibility

eligibility.description: Available to executors of estates consisting largely of interests in closely held businesses where there is a controversy regarding Section 6166 eligibility.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an estate to seek a Tax Court ruling to confirm eligibility for 15-year installment payments of estate tax when the IRS fails to make a determination or denies the election.
